tldr_zh: OpenAI強化長期模型安全機制，Anthropic版權和解獲批，Paramount併購遭暫停；科技政策與AI競爭升溫。
tldr_en: OpenAI bolsters long-horizon model safety; Anthropic copyright settlement approved; Paramount merger halted amid antitrust concerns.

items.title_zh: OpenAI分享長期模型安全部署經驗與新風險防護
items.title_en: OpenAI Shares Safety Lessons from Long-Horizon AI Models Deployment
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布長期報告，分享部署長時間運行AI模型的經驗，揭示新興安全風險、觀察到的系統失敗，以及通過迭代部署改進的保護措施。此舉強調了AI安全與對齊在複雜系統中的重要性，為業界設置新標準。
items.summary_en: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting emerging safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment. The report sets new standards for AI safety and alignment in complex systems.

items.title_zh: AI招聘偏差研究：AI比人類更易形成招聘歧視
items.title_en: Research Shows AI Develops Stronger Hiring Biases Than Humans
items.summary_zh: 新研究表明，大語言模型不僅會從訓練數據中吸收人類偏差，還能獨立發展新的招聘偏差。這表示AI篩選履歷時可能比人類更具有系統性的歧視性，對求職者公平性造成威脅。
items.summary_en: New research reveals that LLMs can develop their own hiring biases independent of training data, potentially exhibiting stronger discrimination than humans when screening resumes. This raises significant fairness concerns for job applicants.

items.title_zh: Anthropic著名版權和解案15億美元獲最終批准
items.title_en: Anthropic's $1.5B Copyright Settlement Receives Final Court Approval
items.summary_zh: Anthropic與出版商的1.5億美元版權和解案獲得最終批准，解決了涉及該公司的一項訴訟。然而，這項和解並未解決更廣泛的問題——即使用受版權保護的作品訓練AI模型的合法性問題仍待解決。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's $1.5B copyright settlement receives final approval, resolving one lawsuit but leaving broader questions about using copyrighted works for AI training unresolved. This marks a significant settlement but not the end of industry-wide copyright disputes.

items.title_zh: Sony控告Udio音樂生成器侵權3萬首歌曲著作權
items.title_en: Sony Sues Udio AI Music Generator Over 30,000 Copyrighted Songs
items.summary_zh: Sony Music Entertainment對AI音樂生成器Udio提起訴訟，指控其侵犯30,000多首歌曲的著作權，涵蓋Elvis Presley到Beyoncé等藝術家作品。該訴訟凸顯了AI音樂生成與音樂產業版權之間的持續衝突。
items.summary_en: Sony Music Entertainment sues Udio over copyright infringement of 30,000+ songs ranging from Elvis Presley to Beyoncé. The lawsuit highlights ongoing tensions between AI-generated music and music industry intellectual property rights.

items.title_zh: 派拉蒙併購華納兄弟案遭聯邦法官暫停，反壟斷訴訟升溫
items.title_en: Federal Judge Halts Paramount's $111B Acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery
items.summary_zh: 聯邦法官應12州檢察長要求，暫停派拉蒙與華納兄弟探索公司的1110億美元併購案。法官認為該併購案「可能違反反壟斷法」，新合併公司的市場份額引發競爭擔憂，為美國娛樂業併購案帶來重大阻力。
items.summary_en: A federal judge grants a temporary restraining order halting Paramount's $111B acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery at the request of 12 state attorneys general. The judge cited likely antitrust law violations based on the merged company's market share concerns.

items.title_zh: Google開發新AI晶片加速Gemini模型運行效率
items.title_en: Google Develops Custom AI Chip to Optimize Gemini Model Efficiency
items.summary_zh: Alphabet公司正開發新專用晶片以提升Gemini模型的運行效率。此舉反映了主要科技公司紛紛開發自有AI晶片的趨勢，以降低成本並獲得競爭優勢。
items.summary_en: Alphabet is developing a custom AI chip designed to make its Gemini models run more efficiently. This reflects the broader trend of major tech companies building proprietary AI chips to reduce costs and gain competitive advantages.

items.title_zh: FCC準備首次行使權力，追查DJI空殼公司並禁止銷售
items.title_en: FCC Set to Retroactively Ban DJI Drones via Shell Companies
items.summary_zh: 美國聯邦通信委員會準備首次使用法律賦予的權力，回溯性禁止已獲批准的DJI無人機銷售。此舉針對DJI通過「空殼公司」規避審查的行為，標誌著對中國科技產品的監管升級。
items.summary_en: The FCC is preparing to retroactively ban DJI drones that received prior approval by cracking down on DJI front companies suspected of circumventing regulations. This marks the agency's first use of new retroactive banning authority.

items.title_zh: AliExpress因違反歐盟規定遭創紀錄罰款6.25億美元
items.title_en: AliExpress Hit with Record €625M Fine for DSA Violations
items.summary_zh: 在線零售商AliExpress因未依歐盟數位服務法要求移除不安全玩具和危險化妝品，遭歐盟開罰6.25億美元，創下該法實施以來最大罰款紀錄。此舉顯示歐盟對平臺監管的強硬態度。
items.summary_en: AliExpress receives a record €625M fine from the EU for failing to comply with Digital Services Act requirements to remove unsafe toys and dangerous cosmetics. This represents the largest DSA fine to date and signals EU's stringent platform oversight.

items.title_zh: Cursor開發工具爆嚴重安全漏洞，可被惡意儲存庫利用執行任意程式碼
items.title_en: Popular AI Code Editor Cursor Vulnerable to Arbitrary Code Execution via Malicious Repositories
items.summary_zh: 擁有700萬活躍用戶的AI輔助開發工具Cursor存在重大漏洞，攻擊者可透過偽造的Git倉庫在用戶毫不知情的情況下執行任意程式碼。該漏洞無需複雜技巧即可觸發，對開發者安全造成嚴重威脅。
items.summary_en: Popular AI-assisted coding tool Cursor, used by 7 million active developers, has a critical vulnerability allowing attackers to execute arbitrary code via malicious Git repositories without user interaction. The vulnerability requires no advanced techniques to exploit.

items.title_zh: Claude瀏覽器擴充ClaudeBleed漏洞未完全修補，仍可被濫用竊取Gmail
items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude Browser Extension Vulnerability Still Unpatched, Risking Gmail Theft
items.summary_zh: Anthropic於5月修補的ClaudeBleed漏洞仍未完全解決，攻擊者可濫用瀏覽器擴充套件偽造點擊以執行Claude任務，進而竊取Gmail信件與Google文件等敏感資訊。安全業者Manifold示警此漏洞持續存在。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's Claude for Chrome extension still contains the previously disclosed ClaudeBleed vulnerability, allowing attackers to forge clicks and execute arbitrary Claude tasks to steal Gmail messages and Google Docs. Security firm Manifold warns the patch remains incomplete.

items.title_zh: 川普對加拿大進口商品徵50%關稅，北美貿易戰升溫
items.title_en: Trump Imposes 50% Tariff on Canadian Imports, Escalating North American Trade Tensions
items.summary_zh: 美國總統川普對加拿大進口商品徵收50%的關稅，標誌著北美鄰國間貿易緊張局勢的重大升級。此舉可能進一步衝擊加美經貿關係和全球供應鏈。
items.summary_en: President Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Canadian imports, marking a major escalation in trade tensions between North American neighbors. The move threatens to further strain Canada-US economic relations and global supply chains.

items.title_zh: 美軍對伊朗發動新一波空襲，川普警告伊朗報復必付代價
items.title_en: US Launches Fresh Military Strikes on Iran; Trump Warns of Retaliation for Soldier Deaths
items.summary_zh: 美軍對伊朗發動新的空襲行動，目標是削弱伊朗在荷莫茲海峽的攻擊能力。川普警告伊朗須為殺害美國軍人付出「數倍」代價，美伊軍事對抗風險升高。
items.summary_en: The US launches fresh military strikes on Iran aimed at degrading Iran's capabilities to attack ships in the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump warns Iran must pay "multiple times over" for soldiers' deaths, escalating US-Iran military tensions.
